tool_args.label: Firm fixed price per additional radio

payload.description: Negotiated firm fixed price per additional PTC Data Radio beyond the quantity of 250 during the contract term

tool_args.label: PTC Data Radios - MNR and LIRR

payload.project_name: Supply and Delivery of PTC Data Radios for MNR & LIRR
payload.description: Award of a contract to GE Grid Solutions, LLC for the supply and delivery of Positive Train Control (PTC) Data Radios for Metro-North Railroad and Long Island Rail Road

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.description: MTA Committee meeting for procurement approval
MTA Board meeting for procurement approval
Bids received from GE Grid Solutions and Siemens Mobility, Inc.
Start of the PTC Data Radios contract term
End of the PTC Data Radios contract term including options
GE will continue to support existing legacy data radios until December 2026, when new radios will be available

tool_args.label: Bids non-responsive
tool_args.raw_text: GE, the low apparent bidder, and Siemens, the second bidder, both indicated the ability to perform the work and supply materials. However, GE and Siemens both took exception to several terms and conditions of the contract, including cybersecurity requirements. Both bids were therefore determined to be non-responsive.

payload.claim_text: GE and Siemens both took exception to several terms and conditions of the contract, including cybersecurity requirements. Both bids were therefore determined to be non-responsive.
payload.subject: IFB for PTC Data Radios
payload.description: Both bids received for the PTC Data Radios IFB were determined non-responsive due to exceptions taken to terms and conditions

tool_args.label: Backward compatibility design
tool_args.raw_text: Under this contract, GE will use its proprietary firmware with the necessary engineering efforts to design, build, and functionally test the next generation PTC Data Radio. Its design will include backward compatibility to work with the legacy data radio currently in use by the Railroads.

payload.claim_text: GE will use its proprietary firmware with the necessary engineering efforts to design, build, and functionally test the next generation PTC Data Radio. Its design will include backward compatibility to work with the legacy data radio currently in use by the Railroads.
payload.subject: Next generation PTC Data Radio design
payload.description: The new PTC Data Radio design will be backward compatible with existing legacy data radios

tool_args.label: 250 initial units over 5-year delivery
tool_args.raw_text: After delivery of the prototype units to the Railroads for environmental integration testing and commissioning, an initial lot of 250 units will be supplied over a five-year delivery schedule.

payload.claim_text: After delivery of the prototype units to the Railroads for environmental integration testing and commissioning, an initial lot of 250 units will be supplied over a five-year delivery schedule.
payload.subject: PTC Data Radio delivery schedule
payload.description: Initial lot of 250 PTC Data Radios to be delivered over five years after prototype approval

tool_args.label: Five-year warranty per unit
tool_args.raw_text: Each unit delivered will have a five-year warranty period and will replace existing radios as they fail.

payload.claim_text: Each unit delivered will have a five-year warranty period and will replace existing radios as they fail.
payload.subject: PTC Data Radio warranty
payload.description: Each PTC Data Radio unit has a five-year warranty

tool_args.label: Zero MWBE/SDVOB goals
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights has set zero percent MWBE/SDVOB goals on this contract due to the lack of subcontracting opportunities and MWBE/SDVOB firms in the marketplace.

payload.claim_text: The MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights has set zero percent MWBE/SDVOB goals on this contract due to the lack of subcontracting opportunities and MWBE/SDVOB firms in the marketplace.
payload.subject: MWBE/SDVOB goals for PTC Data Radio contract
payload.description: Zero percent MWBE/SDVOB goals set due to lack of subcontracting opportunities and marketplace availability

tool_args.label: PTC federal mandate compliance
tool_args.raw_text: However, the current PTC Data Radios are now obsolete and need to be updated and replaced in order to maintain compliance with the PTC federal mandate.

payload.claim_text: The current PTC Data Radios are now obsolete and need to be updated and replaced in order to maintain compliance with the PTC federal mandate.
payload.subject: PTC compliance requirement
payload.description: Obsolete PTC Data Radios need replacement to maintain federal mandate compliance
Total proposed estimated expenditure for the Metro-North Railroad Procurement Agenda this month

tool_args.label: PTC Data Radio contract total price

payload.description: Total price of $3.8 million consisting of project engineering, hardware and firmware integration, factory validation, prototype commissioning, and first 250 production units

payload.description: GE legacy data radio support ends December 2026 when new radios become available
